payload.expected: Complete the implementation, verification, review, and tracker closeout with proportionate evidence.
payload.observed: The correct outcome required repeated closeout-body repairs and validator reruns; the published evidence body was 51,068 bytes.
payload.consequence: Tracker closeout required substantial additional procedural work after implementation and verification were complete.
payload.workaround_taken: Repaired the evidence body iteratively and reran every applicable closeout validator before mutation.

payload.expected: The closeout scaffold for sole in-scope child issue #130 accurately represents parent #129 as contextual and outside closeout scope.
payload.observed: The available non-parent scaffold mode emitted sibling-issue-set and no-parent-PRD wording that did not match the live issue relationship.
payload.consequence: The implementation completed correctly, but the closeout body required manual scope-wording repair and validator reruns before tracker mutation.
payload.workaround_taken: Used the issue-set scaffold, replaced the inaccurate relationship wording with exact single-issue and parent-out-of-scope facts, then reran the TDD, normal-review, and implement validators.

payload.task_label: issue 133 constitutional approval publication and closeout
payload.expected: Publish the approved tracker-only wording packet, verify its stored body, and close issue 133 without repository changes.
payload.observed: The correct closeout required an empty-diff review fallback, a local-only unchanged authority SHA record, a detailed closeout body, and one validator-correction rerun before closure.
payload.consequence: Issue 133 closed correctly after nontrivial additional procedural work and repeated closeout validation.
payload.workaround_taken: Used the unchanged HEAD as the authority snapshot, recorded tracker-only and local-only dispositions, completed local two-axis fallback evidence, and corrected validator-required pass tokens and URL anchors.

payload.risk_rationale: Implement governs stateful repository edits, verification, commits, tracker transitions, and several materially distinct execution branches.

payload.summary: Candidate passed 78/78 deterministic tests and was 82.8% smaller in runtime Markdown, but blind paired trials found material regressions in trials 01 and 05; candidate rejected without landing.

payload.note: Blind paired validation found material regressions in the candidate on the documentation-issue and review-fix closeout trials; the live target remains at the claimed baseline hash.

payload.expected: The structured evidence builder and closeout validators produce a usable mutation-ready closeout body with a bounded correction loop.
payload.observed: The completed run required repeated builder and validator corrections, including rebuilding and refilling the closeout scaffold after structured evidence changes.
payload.consequence: The implementation and tracker closeout completed correctly, but the evidence closeout added substantial repeated reconstruction and validation effort.
payload.workaround_taken: Updated the structured evidence, rebuilt and refilled the closeout body, then reran TDD, review, and implement validators until all passed.

payload.expected: Treat a pre-generation provider failure as an invalid qualitative comparison and pause without requesting a prompt-quality decision.
payload.observed: The run initially framed NO-GO as the only valid decision and requested owner authorization; the owner pointed out that no LLM responses existed.
payload.consequence: One correction turn was required before the receipt was withheld and issue 136 returned to triage; no incorrect receipt or closure was published.
payload.workaround_taken: After the owner's correction, the run classified the comparison as invalid, withheld the receipt, documented the failed attempt, and returned issue 136 to needs-triage.

payload.task_label: implement #136 v2 field run and return-to-triage
implement GitHub issue #142 provider-safe strict output schemas
Implement GitHub issue #136 (scope-resolved to human/steward field slice)

payload.summary: Rejected: reproduction trial failed the frozen structured-audit derivation and state-readback rubric; candidate target-local conformance check also failed. Adjacent/core trials were otherwise noninferior or better.

payload.note: Candidate improved tracker-only, ordinary implementation, and child-family planning, but the reproduction trial still failed to keep publishable audit rows explicitly builder-derived and omitted issue-state readback; the target-local guidance conformance test also failed. Live target unchanged.

payload.expected: The /implement closeout gate applies cleanly to a tracker-only issue that changes no repository file and produces no code diff.
payload.observed: Producing a passing closeout body needed the full closeout-templates reference plus three validate-closeout-body.mjs rounds: the first failed on 9 missing/format items (verification ledger, evidence-identity categories, freshness, body-check and gate lines, proof-surface anchors), the second (--emit-preflight --mutation-ready) failed on a missing itemized Closeout preflight block, before mutation-ready passed; verification, TDD, review, and browser each had to be hand-fit as justified N/A.
payload.consequence: #146 closed correctly, but with nontrivial extra procedural cost and reruns for a zero-code-change issue.
payload.workaround_taken: Adapted the code/TDD/review/browser-shaped closeout fields (git-only verification ledger with final-tree rows, evidence-identity categories, itemized Closeout preflight block) to tracker-only N/A values to satisfy the validators.

payload.expected: Documented helper-command examples run as written: validate-closeout-body.mjs accepts the closeout body per its "$body" example, and build-acceptance-manifest.mjs builds the manifest from the arguments shown.
payload.observed: build-acceptance-manifest.mjs required a saved issues.json path (passing issue numbers '125 127 129' gave ENOENT open '125'); validate-closeout-body.mjs reads its first positional arg as a file path (passing the inline body content gave ENAMETOOLONG).
payload.consequence: Two failed helper invocations and reruns before the manifest and audit-validation steps succeeded; no incorrect output was produced.
payload.workaround_taken: Wrote the issues snapshot and the closeout audit body to files and passed the file paths instead.

payload.note: ten_use_unresolved authorized a diagnosis (13 uses on hash b4857.., 4 open incidents); not a presumption of defect. Authorizing tool-compatibility cluster decomposes into two distinct mechanisms, neither a proportionate target defect. evt_edebe2f7 (lone in-scope child #130 with contextual parent #129 not being closed): build-closeout-body.mjs supports only parent|issue-set scope and HARD-CODES 'sibling issue set / N/A no parent PRD' strings (lines 572/661/784-788), so issue-set emits factually-wrong parent wording for a contextual parent. Wrong wording is builder-emitted => no reference/doc-only candidate can fix it; only real fix is a multi-file build-closeout-body + validate-closeout-body + test change (new single-issue/contextual-parent scope mode), disproportionate to one friction-severity incident and high regression risk (prior review rev_6d02b15c already had a closeout candidate rejected for breaking the deterministic suite). Task-specific novel scope shape => resolved_no_change. evt_8cf62d5c: references correctly/self-consistently document file-path inputs (body=/tmp/..md L271, test -f $body L15, capture-github-issues --output /tmp/issues.json L41; no doc passes issue numbers to the manifest builder); ENOENT/ENAMETOOLONG came from improvising arg forms against sound docs = model/operator behavior, not a target defect. evt_682a6d4e (execution): pre-generation provider-failure NO-GO framing in a bounded qualitative comparison is owned by the comparison/generation-decision contract, outside implement's closeout scope; routed to that owner factually, no repair proposed here. evt_76a94d94 (cost, tracker-only zero-diff) deliberately NOT adjudicated: it belongs to the cost compliance-defect the prior review identified and left unresolved after candidate rejection; left open for a future cycle with a valid candidate. No minimal, materially-better, deterministically-safe candidate exists for any demonstrated mechanism; live target unchanged. Steps 4-8 not reached.

payload.expected: The closeout bodies for #149 plus the #145 parent and #132 superseded closes would fill and pass the skill's closing validators in a straightforward pass.
payload.observed: Each of the three closeout bodies needed several validator-rejection rounds: accepted-residual records required one-field-per-line formatting, a satisfied audit row needed a concrete proof-surface path, the parent rollup needed an added verification-command ledger and body-check line, and --mutation-ready rejected a bare 'accepted residuals' phrase in the parent rollup that only referenced the child's residuals; separately the squash-merge moved the final SHA off the reviewed HEAD so the review frame had to be re-anchored.
payload.consequence: Several extra validate-fix iterations across three closeout bodies before the mutation-ready gate passed; the final closeout was correct and complete with all three issues CLOSED-COMPLETED.
payload.workaround_taken: Anchored the review frame's reviewed-HEAD SHA to the identical-tree merged squash commit so the immediate-fix Review SHA matched the remote-reachable final SHA.

payload.summary: Tracker-only zero-diff closeout recipe. Deterministic D1/D2/D3/D5 pass and T2-T5 blind trials noninferior with T5 safety preserved, but the frozen T1 reproduction gate (strictly fewer rounds-to-pass) tied 0-0: a capable executor reaches a first-pass mutation-ready body on both the candidate and the current skill. Candidate is +6KB growth, not smaller; tie-breaker keeps the incumbent.

payload.note: Scope: authorizing trigger evt_76a94d94 (tracker-only #146 close). Confirmed target defect: no first-class zero-code-diff closeout path. Candidate added one gated Tracker-Only/Zero-Code-Diff recipe to references/closeout-templates.md + a SKILL.md §4 pointer (isolated to 2 files; no script changed). Deterministic D1/D2/D3/D5 all pass (guidance-conformance test that failed the prior candidate now passes; filled recipe body clears --emit-preflight --mutation-ready one-shot). Blind T2-T5 noninferior with no material/severe regression; T5 safety invariant preserved (recipe's explicit one-line-code guard actively blocked misuse). REJECTED because the frozen primary reproduction gate (T1 strictly-fewer-rounds) tied 0-0: version-blind executors reached a first-pass mutation-ready tracker-only body on BOTH the candidate and the current skill, so the head-to-head did not show the candidate materially better on the frozen metric. Candidate is +6KB growth (larger, not smaller); tie-breaker keeps the incumbent. Live target unchanged.

payload.summary: Blind 5-trial paired validation (10 executions). Mechanism = no-ledger structured accepted-residual record format missing from the validator-passing-field catalog; candidate added one copy-ready form (+1268B, closeout-templates.md only). Primary reproduction gate NOT met: T1 0-vs-0 and T2 0-vs-0 rounds — both current-skill blind executors front-loaded the 796-line validator and derived the exact Accepted residual/Axis record first-pass, incl. the parent-rollup own-record case. Noninferior on T3/T4; T5 safety preserved both arms; D1-D5 all pass. Behaviorally tied on the mechanism and candidate is larger, so the tie-breaker keeps the incumbent.

payload.note: Confirmed target defect: the no-immediate-fix structured accepted-residual record format (two-line 'Accepted residual:' + 'Axis: Standards|Spec', parent rollup must carry its own) is undocumented outside the validator source and absent from the validator-passing-field catalog. Minimal candidate added one copy-ready form (+1268B, closeout-templates.md only; no script changed; D1-D5 pass; D3 one-shot mutation-ready). Blind 5-trial paired validation REJECTED it: frozen primary reproduction gate (strictly fewer rounds on T1) tied 0-0, and T2 tied 0-0 — both current-skill blind executors front-loaded the 796-line validator and reached first-pass mutation-ready bodies with correct structured records, incl. the parent-rollup own-record case. Noninferior elsewhere, T5 safety preserved. Behaviorally tied + candidate larger, so the tie-breaker retains the incumbent. Live target unchanged.
